examples: In its earliest form, genius was concerned with the ability of the head of the family, the paterfamilias, to perpetuate himself.
So sons legally were still under their paterfamilias.
As the paterfamilias, you have to work hard to support your family.
The Darwin who emerges is most remarkable for the way in which he combines the attributes of world-class thinker and paterfamilias.
Ramsay skipped the personal attacks on Fastow's role as paterfamilias, focusing on the ex-CFO's relations with Lay--who also founded the energy giant.
